overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring the interior of a rustic wooden log cabin. The player moves through a kitchen, living areas, and ascends a staircase while holding a handgun. The environment features detailed wood textures, stone fireplaces, and warm interior lighting mixed with natural light from windows.

segments.scene_description: The player explores a rustic kitchen with log cabin walls and dark wooden cabinets. Open shelves display ceramic plates and spices above a stainless steel sink. The camera moves around the space examining countertops and appliances.

large stone fireplace with dark opening
stacked cardboard boxes in corner

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the kitchen into a transitional space featuring a white refrigerator and a large stone fireplace. Cardboard boxes are stacked in the corner as the space opens into the main living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: side room with patterned rug and exit to forest exterior

segments.scene_description: The player enters a side room featuring a large patterned rug and wooden dresser. An open doorway reveals a view of green forest outside, while a floor lamp provides warm lighting. A bookshelf stands against the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: spacious log cabin living room with high ceiling and grand staircase

events.description: returning to main living area with large windows and wooden staircase

antler chandelier hanging from high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player returns to the main living area featuring a grand wooden staircase with log railings, a stone fireplace, and high ceilings with an antler chandelier. Large windows let in natural light over a leather sofa.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase with framed family photos and owl paintings

events.description: beginning to ascend wooden staircase while looking at framed photos

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden staircase while examining framed photos on table and owl paintings on wall

entered.detail: framed family photographs on table under stairs
framed paintings of owls on wooden wall
log cabin style wooden stair railing

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the wooden staircase, passing framed family photos on a table underneath. The wall features prominent framed paintings of owls. The lighting becomes dimmer and more enclosed as the player climbs higher.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rustic log cabin, moving from the functional confines of a kitchen into expansive living areas before ascending toward a dimmer upper floor. It begins by navigating a kitchen filled with dark wooden cabinets and ceramic plates, before gliding past a white refrigerator and a large stone fireplace as the space opens up. The camera then drifts into a side room characterized by a patterned rug and a glimpse of the green forest outside, before returning to the main living area to reveal high ceilings and an antler chandelier. Finally, the perspective shifts upward as the camera ascends a grand wooden staircase, passing framed family photos and owl paintings while the bright natural light of the lower floor gives way to a more enclosed, dim atmosphere.
